What can be

  • Defense - "The action of defending from or resisting attack" - The need for defense is self evident on every level of existence.
  • Violence - "Behavior involving physical force intended to hurt, damage, or kill someone or something" - Sufficient control can eliminate violence in defense.
  • War - "A state of armed conflict between different nations or states or different groups within a nation or state" - Direct human participation can be limited to non-destructive war.

Hypothesis: Arrival of nuclear fusion energy, robotization and resulting abundance of resources will reduce economic reasons for war and allow for properly controlled warfare.

3 Component System

Conflict Prevention - prevent conflict by finding solutions that work for all involved parties
War Prevention - demonstrate mutual will to prevent war
Controlled Combat - control the use of force in combat

Demonstrate

  1. Demonstrate forceful defense without violence
  2. Show the will to prevent war
  3. Demonstrate the ability to resolve tensions before they build into a crisis

Implement

1. Implement forceful defense without violence
2. Channel it towards fostering moral values
3. Reduce technological dominance in enforcement of non-violence

Details
